sections.title: Menu for Panda Express at Universal Studios Hollywood
Beverages
items: Enjoy more than 100 drink choices and refills thru the day* with the Coca-Cola Freestyle® souvenir cup. Get 1 for at participating Coca-Cola Freestyle® locations. *Valid Coca-Cola Freestyle® Souvenir Cup required to dispense Coca-Cola Freestyle®. Refills are valid on day of purchase only. Sharing is not permitted. Additional restrictions may apply which are subject to change without notice.

*Valid Coca-Cola Freestyle® Souvenir Cup required to dispense Coca-Cola Freestyle®. Refills are valid on day of purchase only. Sharing is not permitted. Additional restrictions may apply which are subject to change without notice.

Enjoy more than 100 drink choices and refills thru the day* with the Coca-Cola Freestyle® souvenir cup. Get 2 for each ( total) at participating Coca-Cola Freestyle® locations. *Valid Coca-Cola Freestyle® Souvenir Cup required to dispense Coca-Cola Freestyle®. Refills are valid on day of purchase only. Sharing is not permitted. Additional restrictions may apply which are subject to change without notice.

Extra day of refills for Freestyle® Cup

Add an extra day of refills thru the day* to your previously purchased Coca-Cola Freestyle® Souvenir Cup *Valid Coca-Cola Freestyle® Souvenir Cup required to dispense Coca-Cola Freestyle®. Refills are valid on day of purchase only. Sharing is not permitted. Additional restrictions may apply which are subject to change without notice.
